## Apple Shares Close at New All-Time High

AAPL reaching all-time highs without a cited fundamental catalyst may reflect rotation from high-multiple AI names rather than a business re-rating; durability of the move depends on whether the underlying catalyst is flow-driven or fundamental.

- AAPL sets a new all-time closing and intraday high per MacDailyNews
- No fundamental business catalyst cited in the headline
- Move likely co-incidents with the reported market cap rotation from NVDA (see clusters e3e3ca5c29385f72 and e5e6a8b9034b1478)
- Confidence low for fundamental thesis signal
